prompt: We need to submit our annual KYC-SA attestation by July 31. Walk us through the complete attestation process — what we need to prepare, who can act as our independent assessor, how to complete the KYC-SA form, and what happens to our attestation once submitted. We are an A1 architecture bank.
assertions: Describes the KYC-SA portal on swift.com/myswift as the submission mechanism
Explains that an independent assessor is required and lists who qualifies: internal audit (if independent from SWIFT ops), external auditor with SWIFT CSP competency, or SWIFT-certified assessors
States the annual deadline of July 31 and the consequences of late submission including counterparty notifications
Explains the three attestation statuses for each control: Implemented, Partially Implemented, Not Implemented
Notes that submitted attestations are visible to counterparties who can view compliance status and may request clarification
